_comment: Cognitum — two SSE surfaces. (1) cognitum: cloud control plane at cognitum.one (7 cloud tools); read is open, writes need ${COGNITUM_API_KEY}. (2) cognitum-seed: local Seed appliance (114 on-device tools) at cognitum.local:8443, paired bearer ${COGNITUM_SEED_TOKEN}, USB-gadget fallback http://169.254.42.1/mcp. Use env-refs only — NEVER commit literal keys. Merge into .claude/settings.json or claude_desktop_config.json.
